content.full_text:
February 2, 1978


Mr. Herbert M. Schulze
875 Millbrae Avenue
Santa Rosa, California 95401

Dear Mr. Schulze:

In your letter of January 27, 1978, you ask whether it is necessary
for the Sonoma County Democratic Central Committee - which I understand to be a committee that has received contributions in the past
- to file a form 410 each year.

The form 410, Statement of Organization, is filed only upon the
organization of a recipient committee. It is not to be filed
annually. Whenever any of the information contained in the 410 has
changed, an amendment must be filed within 10 days of the change.

In answer to your second question, if you have neither received
contributions nor made expenditures during 1977, it is not necessary
to file campaign statements for 1977. You may, however, file form
421, the voluntary committee report of no activity.

Sincerely yours,


John D. Giansello
Technical Assistance and
Analysis Division

sections.question: Whether it is necessary for the Sonoma County Democratic Central Committee - which has received contributions in the past - to file a form 410 each year, and whether campaign statements must be filed if no contributions were received nor expenditures made during 1977.
sections.conclusion: The form 410, Statement of Organization, is filed only upon the organization of a recipient committee. It is not to be filed annually. Whenever any of the information contained in the 410 has changed, an amendment must be filed within 10 days of the change. If you have neither received contributions nor made expenditures during 1977, it is not necessary to file campaign statements for 1977. You may, however, file form 421, the voluntary committee report of no activity.
sections.question_synthetic: The inquirer asks whether a recipient committee must file Form 410 annually and whether campaign statements are required for a year in which no contributions were received or expenditures made.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: Form 410 is filed only when a recipient committee is organized, not annually, though amendments must be filed within 10 days of any changes. Campaign statements are not required for years with no contributions or expenditures, though Form 421 may be voluntarily filed.
sections.parsing_notes: Format: ocr; LLM: Standard advice letter format with clear question and conclusion sections. OCR quality appears high with no apparent scanning errors affecting content.
